'''Mama''' was an [[Information broker/Legends|information broker]] on [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]]. As a member of the [[Columi/Legends|Columi]] [[Species/Legends|species]], Mama possessed a large hairless head, which weighed a fifth of her total body weight and was supported by a tiny bipedal body. She had [[Color/Legends|black]] unblinking [[Eye/Legends|eyes]].<ref name="Luck" />

She was the proprietor of a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler's]] [[Mama's|haven]]. [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] contacted her to find out information about [[Alfreda Goot]] who had kidnapped [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]];<ref name="Luck" /> however, Mama was [[Death/Legends|killed]] shortly afterwards, causing her two sons—[[Marvid Qreph|Marvid]] and [[Craitheus Qreph]]—to spend the next several [[Standard decade/Legends|decades]] hunting down and "destroying" all possible suspects in her murder. The two killed over a dozen suspects and their families, wrecking their victims' lives before killing them.<ref name="Crucible" />
